wikitext:
{{Event Header|StS2 Dense Vegetation.png}} {{E|Dense Vegetation|2}} is an {{2|Events|Event}} found in the {{2|Overgrowth}}. == Options == {{Frame|Trudge On}}
One of the following options is randomly offered: * {{TS|positive||Remove a card from Deck.}} {{TS|negative||Lose 11 HP.}} * or {{TS|positive||Gain 64 gold}} {{TS|negative||Lose 8 HP.}} {{Frame|Rest}} {{TS|positive||Heal HP (rest site amount).}} {{TS|negative||Fight 4 {{2|Wriggler}}s.}} == Dialogue ==
Having taken the wrong path for a good while, you find yourself in a thick jungle of {{TS|green||ferns}}, {{TS|green||shrubs}}, and {{TS|green||vines}}. Especially vines. Exhaustion sets in, and a dark thought comes to mind: {{TS|purple|up|"You are lost, unprepared, and the inevitability of death is approaching."}} What do you do?
{{Frame|Trudge On}}
You hack and slash your way through the jungle but it goes on and on... You sustain yourself on {{TS|green||strange fruits}}, {{TS|orange||crunchy bugs}}, and drink the nectar of {{TS|blue||glowing plants}} but you start feeling {{TS|red|shake|paranoid...}} But then you find a clearing, a trail, and some {{TS|gold||Gold}} coins scattered on the ground. Amongst the coins are some crudely-drawn maps! Problem solved.
{{Frame|Rest}}
You're dead tired and take a nap... ...only to be awoken by something wriggling around on top of you!
{{Frame|Fight!}}
Combat encounter with 4 {{2|Wriggler}}s.
== Notes == *If you choose to {{Frame|Rest}}, the {{2|Wriggler}}s combat counts as a normal combat encounter for purposes such as {{R|Prayer Wheel||2}} and will drop normal combat rewards. [[Category:Events]] [[Category:Slay the Spire 2 Content]]
